family_summaries.lesson: Polynomially many samples can isolate the shift with exhaustive enumeration; any speedup claim needs a decoding lower bound, not just a query lower bound.

rows.access_model: shifted-oracle samples plus public explicit base evaluator; exhaustive candidate enumeration
rows.lower_bound_obligation: Prove candidate enumeration requires superpolynomial time or find a non-exhaustive decoder; query evidence alone is insufficient.
rows.notes: A polynomial number of shifted-oracle samples uniquely fingerprints the shift in at least one trial, but the implemented decoder enumerates the full shift group.
